calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-14-2009 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Special Motion To Strike First Cause Of Action And For Award Of Attorneys Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Apr-10-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Defendant Jason Shine, Sean Queenan, and Fog City Dog Lodge, Inc's Special motion to strike first cause of action and for award of attorney's fees and costs. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. (302KOPP)Judge: Quentin Kopp; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-10-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT JASON SHINE, and, SEAN QUEENAN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: Sustained with leave to amend. Amended Complaint to be filed by April 20, 2009. No opposition Filed. (302KOPP)Judge: Quentin Kopp; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797
